race.comment: The $160,000 Listed Princess Stakes. SMEXY (2) returned to the winners' stall at Doomben last time out and gets a jockey upgrade in the form of gun hoop Tommy Berry. Should get the run of the race from the favourable draw and can go back-to-back without surprising. SPICY LU (1) has been plying her trade in harder Group races down south and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Capable of sharp improvement. NIGHTLINE (4) resumes here but the form she showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this calibre. Keep safe while fresh. BURN THE SKY (5) has placed over this mile journey and maps nicely for this from gate two. In the mix. SAMARELLE (6) next best in a competitive contest.
